---
title: "DP as Hypothesis Testing"
format: html
---

<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=notebook.html">
<script>
window.location.replace("notebook.html");
</script>

This compatibility page redirects to the notebook-first RevealJS deck:

- [Open the DP-as-hypothesis-testing lecture deck](notebook.html)
- Editable source: `lectures/03-hypothesis_testing/notebook.ipynb`
